proposal.working_title: AI Replacing Jobs in 2026: How to Audit Which Workflows Reshape vs Disappear
proposal.one_line_angle: BCG's research says AI reshapes more roles than it replaces; the missing playbook is a workflow-by-workflow audit that pinpoints which steps stay human, which get augmented, and which get fully automated inside one role at a time.
outline_bullets: The reshape-vs-replace distinction: why role-level headlines mislead operations leaders and step-level workflow maps don't
The 90-minute reshape audit: a five-question workflow inventory we use with done-for-you clients to tag every task as keep, augment, or automate
Three roles where reshape beats replace in 2026: sales operations, customer support, and financial analysis (with concrete before-and-after task maps)
